title: HyCraft
description:
HyCraft is an old 2014 Modpack revitalized for newer versions of Minecraft.

It emphasizes exploration, combat, challenges, & progression in a balanced but chaotic way!
body:
### Introduction

HyCraft is an old Modpack from 2014 revitalized for newer versions of Minecraft.

It emphasizes exploration, combat, challenges, & progression in a balanced but chaotic way! The modpack despite its size is surpizingly fast and lightweight compared to other large modpacks due to tweaks to optimize performance beyond what most other modpacks do, meaning it doesn't require a beefy computer to run!

### Content

Explore new biomes, structures, caves, villages. See new wild life, mobs, flora. Fight new enemy types, bosses. Tame prehistoric animals, pets, explore the depths of the sea, conquer dungeons and visit different dimensions!

Take on new quests, both personal and official - accomplishing new goals & objectives and never get bored with the vast endless new content!

### Mods

Performance: Uses the "Optimalsation" modpack as a baseline which is the fastest performing modpack avalible for Minecraft!

Exploration: Mods that tweak existing terrain, biomes, etc, and mods that add new biomes itself - along with mods that add new structures to the game. This makes exploration way more interesting

Combat: Mods that add new dungeons and mobs, giving you new challenges to face, along with mods that tweak existing mobs to be more difficult along with adding unique bosses that can pose a serious challenge but offer worthwhile rewards!

QoL: Mods that make minecraft more user friendly, accessible and enjoyable like more intuitive keybinds, mouse handling, & much more

### Disclaimer

I include my own "Options.txt" file in order to ensure the resource packs are applied by default and in the correct order. However this file also copies all my other settings from FOV, keybinds, sensitivity, etc, so be sure to tweak things to your own preference because some of them will be different from vanilla
